name: Creamy Onion and Chilies Lorraine
recipeIngredient: 3 oz Monterey Jack cheese, cut into 1/2 x 1/4-inch strips
1 can (10 3/4 oz) condensed Creamy onion soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450 degrees F (230 degrees C). Bake pie crust for 7 minutes.
2. Reduce temperature to 375 degrees F (190 degrees C).
3. Rinse the green chilies and pat dry with paper towels.
4. Make a lengthwise slit in each chili, place a strip of Monterey Jack cheese inside, and repeat with the remaining chilies.
5. Arrange the chilies in the pie crust in a spoke-fashion pattern.
6. In a medium bowl, stir together the condensed Creamy onion soup, milk, and half and half until well combined.
7. Gradually add the remaining ingredients (Swiss cheese, dry mustard, white pepper, hot pepper sauce) to the soup mixture, stirring well.
8. Pour the mixture over the chilies in the pie crust.
9. Bake on a cookie sheet for 1 hour or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean.
10. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
11. Garnish with pitted ripe olives.
12. This recipe serves 6.
